body.en:
87% confidence in a downward move for [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) stands out in this week's AI forecast, with a predicted loss of 1.22%. This drop would be the largest among the tracked coins, surpassing the predicted losses for [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin), [ethereum](/coins/ethereum), [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin), [solana](/coins/solana), and [ripple](/coins/ripple). Given the uniform bearish outlook, with all tracked coins expected to decline, it's clear that the AI model is signaling a broadly negative week for the crypto market. 

A recent headline, [Live markets: Oil bounce and lingering AI selloff pushes bitcoin under $64,000](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/20/live-markets-oil-bounce-and-lingering-ai-selloff-pushes-bitcoin-under-usd64-000), highlights the impact of external factors on the crypto space, as oil prices and AI-related news contribute to market volatility. Despite these challenges, a supplier for Amazon Japan, AZ-Com Maruwa, is [adopting yen stablecoin JPYC for payments](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/20/amazon-japan-supplier-az-com-maruwa-to-adopt-yen-stablecoin-jpyc-for-payments), showing real-world use cases for cryptocurrencies continue to emerge.

## Key Signals This Week

The BitPredictable LSTM AI model's predictions are uniformly bearish, with confidence levels ranging from 76% for [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) to 87% for [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin). These predictions suggest a week of declines across the board, with no coin expected to buck the trend. The model's high confidence in these predictions, particularly for [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin), [ripple](/coins/ripple), and [binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin), indicates a strong likelihood of downward movement. 

South Korea's plans for a [second phase of its CBDC pilot](https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korea-september-second-phase-cbdc-pilot?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound) in September could also influence the market, as central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) continue to gain attention worldwide. Meanwhile, the [crypto week ahead](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/20/u-s-regulatory-developments-and-earnings-ecb-rate-decision-crypto-week-ahead) is filled with potential catalysts, including U.S. regulatory developments and the ECB rate decision.

## Trading Agent Update

The Trading Agent, crypto-ace, had a balanced week with 2 wins and 1 loss, managing risk effectively despite mixed signals. The agent's cumulative return remains negative at -2.75%, with a win rate of 39% over 23 total trades. The Sharpe ratio of -7.58 indicates significant volatility in the agent's performance. However, the ability to navigate challenging market conditions and maintain a disciplined approach to risk management is crucial for long-term success.

## What to Watch

As the market moves forward, it will be essential to monitor the actual performance of the tracked coins against the AI model's predictions. The emergence of real-world use cases, such as the adoption of yen stablecoin JPYC for payments, and the progression of CBDC pilots like South Korea's, will continue to shape the crypto landscape. Additionally, external factors like oil prices and AI-related news will likely remain influential. 

This analysis is for informational purposes only.

## In the News

Moonshot AI IPO push follows Kimi, Alibaba AI releases that shook bitcoin ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/20/moonshot-ai-ipo-push-follows-kimi-alibaba-ai-releases-that-shook-bitcoin))

Bitcoin ETFs see new money again, but inflows remain ‘peanuts’ relative to the recent exodus ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/20/bitcoin-etfs-see-new-money-again-but-inflows-remain-peanuts-relative-to-the-recent-exodus))
body.ja:
BitPredictableのLSTMモデルは、主要な暗号資産が下落することを予測しています。[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin)は-0.96%、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum)は-0.62%、[binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin)は-1.07%、[solana](/coins/solana)は-1.05%、[ripple](/coins/ripple)は-1.14%、[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin)は-1.22%と予測されています。これらの予測の信頼度は、高い水準にあると言えます。特に、[ripple](/coins/ripple)と[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin)の予測信頼度は、それぞれ86%と87%と高い信頼度を示しています。

## 注目シグナル
近日のニュースでは、CoinDeskの「[Live markets: Oil bounce and lingering AI selloff pushes bitcoin under $64,000](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/20/live-markets-oil-bounce-and-lingering-ai-selloff-pushes-bitcoin-under-usd64-000)」や「[Moonshot AI IPO push follows Kimi, Alibaba AI releases that shook bitcoin](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/20/moonshot-ai-ipo-push-follows-kimi-alibaba-ai-releases-that-shook-bitcoin)」が注目されています。これらのニュースは、AIの動向と暗号資産市場の関連性を浮き彫りにしており、今後の市場の動向に大きな影響を与える可能性があります。

## トレードエージェントの状況
トレードエージェント「crypto-ace」の状況を見ると、累積リターンは-2.75%で、勝率は39%です。合計23のトレードを行い、シャープレシオは-7.58となっています。この週は、2勝1敗と微妙な結果です。エージェントのノートによると、バランスの取れた週で、3つのトレードを行い、混合信号があったものの、リスク管理が堅固であったと述べられています。

## 来週のチェックポイント
来週は、CoinDeskの「[U.S. regulatory developments and earnings, ECB rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/20/u-s-regulatory-developments-and-earnings-ecb-rate-decision-crypto-week-ahead)」やCointelegraphの「[South Korea eyes September launch for second phase of CBDC pilot: Report](https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korea-september-second-phase-cbdc-pilot?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound)」などのニュースが注目されます。これらのニュースは、暗号資産市場への影響が予測されます。

投資助言ではありません
